headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund secured a nervous 2-1 victory over Heidenheim in the Bundesliga on Saturday in interim coach Mike Tullberg's last game in charge for their first win in five league games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund beat Heidenheim for first win of 2025

video.headline: Maximilian Beier finds the back of the net for Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Maximilian Beier finds the back of the net for Borussia Dortmund) 2025/02/01 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich conceded three goals in the second half but beat Holstein Kiel 4-3 on Saturday, with striker Harry Kane scoring twice to set a league record for most goals after 50 league games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harry Kane sets Bundesliga record in nervy win

video.headline: Harry Kane's superb header makes it 3-0 Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane's superb header makes it 3-0 Bayern) 2025/02/01 ESHEET

events.name: RB Leipzig at 1. FC Union Berlin
